channel.title: VoiceInk
channel.description: VoiceInk macOS dictation app — release feed

item.title: Version 0.5.005
item.description: ### Fixed - **Sparkle update dialog opening behind the active app**: for an accessory (menu-bar) app, clicking «Check for Updates…» didn't bring the process to the front, so the modal Sparkle alert appeared behind Safari / Chrome / whatever else was focused — the user thought the menu item did nothing. `UpdateController` now implements `SPUStandardUserDriverDelegate` and forces `NSApp.activate(ignoringOtherApps:)` from `standardUserDriverWillShowModalAlert()`, which Sparkle calls right before presenting any modal. Belt-and-braces: we also activate immediately when the user clicks the menu item, before the network round-trip starts.
